steps.name: Implement InkEngine.moveToKnot guard-reset-install
steps.description: Replace the RED scaffold stub in InkEngine.moveToKnot with the real implementation: (1) guard-then-throw path resolution using root.namedContent, (2) direct mutation of 12 StoryState fields listed in RD-01, (3) delegate to applyDivert(target:) for containerStack installation. Remove the SCAFFOLD comment from both InkEngine.swift and Story.swift.
acceptance_criteria: moveToKnot with valid knot name does not throw and canContinue is true after the call
continue() after moveToKnot returns the first line of the target knot
moveToKnot from ended story resets canContinue to true
multiple consecutive moveToKnot calls each produce correct target content
continue after moveToKnot does not contain text from before the jump
moveToKnot from mid-execution state with choices clears currentChoices
global variables (variablesState) are preserved across a jump
moveToKnot with nonexistent knot name throws StoryError.knotNotFound(knotName)
knotNotFound carries the attempted knot name as associated value
moveToKnot with empty string throws knotNotFound with empty string
engine state is unchanged after a failed jump (no state mutation before throw)
stitch not found on valid knot throws knotNotFound with compound 'knot.stitch' path
moveToKnot with stitch resolves compound path and canContinue is true
continue after compound path jump returns first line of stitch
moveToKnot with nil stitch jumps to knot root
save/restore after jump resumes from the jumped-to knot
pre-jump save is unaffected by a later jump
stale frames do not survive reset and save cycle
native moveToKnot continue output matches JS-bridge oracle (macOS only)
steps.criteria: All 24 RED acceptance tests in Milestone6_MoveToKnotTests.swift pass GREEN; all 154 pre-existing tests remain GREEN; no state mutation occurs before a failed jump throw.
steps.scenario_name: US-01 — Jump to a Named Knot
quality_gates: No regressions in other test suites
implementation_notes: Scaffold stubs already exist in both Story.swift and InkEngine.swift — only InkEngine needs real logic; Story.swift delegation is already correct
Guard block must resolve ALL paths before ANY state mutation (D3: atomicity)

12 StoryState fields to reset: returnStack, evalStack, currentChoices, outputStream, callFrameVariables, suppressNextNewline, isEnded, inTagMode, tagAccumulator, inStringMode, stringAccumulator — stackFrames is NOT cleared here
Fields to preserve: variablesState, visitCounts, chosenChoiceTargets
Path resolution: root.namedContent[knot] for knot-only; .namedContent[stitch] chained for compound
Stack installation: applyDivert(target: targetPath) where targetPath is 'knot' or 'knot.stitch'
Error paths: throw StoryError.knotNotFound(knot) if knot missing; throw StoryError.knotNotFound('knot.stitch') if stitch missing on valid knot
One test is already GREEN (engine state unchanged after failed jump) — the scaffold correctly throws before mutation

Do NOT call applyDivert with a compound 'knot.stitch' path unless inklecate actually encodes stitch containers under namedContent with that dotted key — verify by inspecting how applyDivert resolves dotted paths
